since_last: 67% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +3.85%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.39% · BTC -0.41% · Gold -1.42% · Nasdaq100 +0.25%. 67% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +3.85%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +3.85%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -47.42%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.08% at $153.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.08% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
